name: Cream Cheese Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 large Can sliced peaches, drained (20-28oz), reserve juice
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine and beat the first seven ingredients for 2 minutes.
Pour into a greased 10-inch pie pan. Place sliced peaches on top of the batter.
Combine cream cheese, sugar, and peach juice. Beat until smooth.
Spread evenly within 1/2 inch of the edge of the pie pan.
Mix the remaining sugar with cinnamon and nutmeg. Sprinkle over the pie.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
